sinks.expression:
printf( '

%s

%s

', esc_html__( 'WP Consent API integration disabled. Re-enable it any time from Compliance settings (Technical Settings) or via this filter snippet:', 'cookie-notice' ), esc_html( $reenable_snippet ) )

printf( '

%1$s %2$s

%4$s  |  %7$s  |  %9$s

', esc_html__( 'WP Consent API integration active.', 'cookie-notice' ), esc_html__( 'Compliance by Hu-manity.co is now registered as the active Consent Management Platform for this site. Cooperative plugins that support WP Consent API (WooCommerce, Google Site Kit, Burst Statistics, WP Statistics, and others) will gate themselves on the consent state captured by the banner.', 'cookie-notice' ), esc_url( $learn_more_url ), esc_html__( 'Learn more about WP Consent API', 'cookie-notice' ), esc_url( $disable_url ), $confirm_msg, esc_html__( 'Disable integration', 'cookie-notice' ), esc_url( $dismiss_url ), esc_html__( 'Dismiss', 'cookie-notice' ) )
wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have permission to perform this action.', 'cookie-notice' ), '', [ 'response' => 403 ] )
wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have permission to perform this action.', 'cookie-notice' ), '', [ 'response' => 403 ] )
wp_send_json_error( [ 'error' => 'CSV export requires a Pro subscription.' ] )
wp_send_json_error( [ 'error' => 'cookie_notice_options must be valid JSON object.' ] )
wp_die( __( 'You do not have permission to access this page.', 'cookie-notice' ) )
wp_die( __( 'You do not have permission to access this page.', 'cookie-notice' ) )
wp_die( __( 'You do not have permission to access this page.', 'cookie-notice' ) )
wp_die( __( 'You do not have permission to access this page.', 'cookie-notice' ) )
wp_die( __( 'You do not have permission to access this page.', 'cookie-notice' ) )
wp_die( __( 'You do not have permission to access this page.', 'cookie-notice' ) )
wp_die( __( 'You do not have permission to access this page.', 'cookie-notice' ) )

sanitizers.expression: esc_js( __( 'Disable the WP Consent API integration? Cooperative plugins will stop gating on banner consent.', 'cookie-notice' ) )
esc_html( sprintf( _n( '%s domain license', '%s domains license', 1, 'cookie-notice' ), 1 ) )
esc_html( sprintf( _n( '%s domain license', '%s domains license', 5, 'cookie-notice' ), 5 ) )
esc_html( sprintf( _n( '%s domain license', '%s domains license', 10, 'cookie-notice' ), 10 ) )
esc_html( sprintf( _n( '%s domain license', '%s domains license', 20, 'cookie-notice' ), 20 ) )
esc_html( 'Minimum eight characters, at least one capital letter and one number are required.', 'cookie-notice' )
